name: What if my claim for popcorn lung from flavoring gets denied?
description: Appeal fast with better medical evidence and lawyer help.

mainEntity.name: What if my claim for popcorn lung from flavoring gets denied?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal fast with better medical evidence and lawyer help.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal within 20-60 days depending on state; gather more medical proof.** Denials common if causation disputed in diacetyl cases[2]. Key factors: Independent pulmonologist review; show inadequate ventilation/PPE; hearing before comp judge. Utah allows attorney fees if you win appeal. Request denial reasons in writing, file timely, consider third-party suit. Persistence with strong evidence overturns most.
